form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 1710m at Goulburn was 5th-7.2 at the bell, beaten 3.5 m by Always Be Brendan (2:02.90) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $6. Before that, 8th (Fr5) over 1720m after being wide early at this track beaten 35 m by Shes Got A Reason (2:02.70) in NR up to 52 on March 24 at $26. Should get her chance from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr5) over 1758m at Leeton was 7th-13.7 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Vincheska (2:08.50) in 2 WINs on March 10 at $4.40. form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 2 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Seaside Sid at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 52 on March 27 at $13. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Gem N Em at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 58 M on April 4 at $21. One of the main hopes.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week-and-a-half. Lacklustre first-up performance when was well back in the run when 8th (Fr7) over 1710m at Goulburn, beaten 35 m by Lookmeover (2:02.60) in 3yo NR up to 57 on March 30 at $101. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 2100m at this track beaten 80 m by Buddy Brilliance (2:36.40) in No NR on April 2 2024 at $151. May need the outing and prefer others this time.
